title: 月落洼
synopsis: 民国三年（1914年），上海时珞庄。五名嫌疑人各有动机。在这座隐藏着拐卖案秘密的庄园里，真凶就藏在幸存者之中。
styleGuide: 1914 Republican era Shanghai mansion, traditional architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, mysterious atmosphere

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1914 Shanghai mansion murder mystery. Traditional architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, four silhouettes in period costumes, mysterious atmosphere
